name: Abhinav Kotha
education: Masters in Computer Science, Computer Science from University of Louisiana at Lafayette; Bachelor of Technology (BTech), Information Technology from CMR INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY
headline: Senior Software Engineer | Microsoft | Ex- Oracle | Azure Cloud | Scaled Systems for Millions | Full-Stack (Backend-Heavy) | Open to New Opportunities
about: Senior Software Engineer specialized in cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and secure, scalable service design. At Microsoft, I architected and launched a high-performance integration between Azure DNS and Traffic Manager—impacting Microsoft's core networking stack while aligning with Secure Future Initiative mandates for authentication and security. I’ve led zero-downtime service migrations saving $100K annually and upgraded service storage connections to Managed Identity with minimal disruption, significantly boosting security and resilience of the mission critical service. I’m passionate about building resilient architecture, mentoring engineers, and delivering thoughtful solutions that optimize scale, reliability, and customer experience.

output.summary: Senior Software Engineer specialized in cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and secure, scalable service design. At Microsoft, I architected and launched a high-performance integration between Azure DNS and Traffic Manager—impacting Microsoft's core networking stack while aligning with Secure Future Initiative mandates for authentication and security. I’ve led zero-downtime service migrations saving $100K annually and upgraded service storage connections to Managed Identity with minimal disruption, significantly boosting security and resilience of the mission critical service. I’m passionate about building resilient architecture, mentoring engineers, and delivering thoughtful solutions that optimize scale, reliability, and customer experience.

currentPositions.description:
•	Led the design and delivery of TMLink, a low-latency, fault-tolerant API feature integrating Azure DNS with Azure Traffic Manager, contributing to a projected 10% revenue uplift and shaping the roadmap for future internal platform enhancements
•	Implemented an automated RCA framework with event-driven alerts, reducing live site investigation time by 97% (30 min → 1 min).
•	Spearheaded the seamless regional migration of seven web roles in a federal cloud environment, ensuring                 zero downtime and uninterrupted service while yielding annual cost savings of $100K.

Designed and implemented an intelligent automation framework to enhance ICM on-call synthetics investigations. This system integrates real-time telemetry and effectively eliminating manual data collection. As a result, investigation time has been reduced from 30 minutes to 1 minute, significantly improving incident resolution efficiency and ensuring greater system reliability.

recommendationsReceived.name: Danny Tundwe
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Software Engineer II
recommendationsReceived.context: Danny worked with Abhinav on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: Abhinav is an exceptional engineer with a strong grasp of system design and a passion for knowledge sharing. He excels in tackling complex challenges, conducting thorough code reviews, and performing precise root cause analysis. His collaborative approach and technical expertise make him a valuable asset to any team. Highly recommended!

recommendationsReceived.name: Michael Mendel
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Software Engineer 2 at Microsoft
recommendationsReceived.context: Michael worked with Abhinav on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description:
I had the pleasure of working with Abhinav at Microsoft for over two years. Abhinav is an exceptional engineer with a unique ability to tackle ambiguous projects, diving deep to find solutions even in areas with limited documentation. He consistently demonstrated a strong growth mindset, always eager to learn, adapt, and do the right thing, even when it required extra effort. 

Abhinav embraced change with a positive attitude and was a reliable and thoughtful teammate. Beyond that, he became a good friend and someone I could always count on. His approachable and kind nature made a real difference in both team collaboration and morale.

I’m confident Abhinav will continue to excel and bring impactful contributions, both professionally and personally, to any team he joins.

recommendationsReceived.name: Rajeev Nischal
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Principal Software Engineer
recommendationsReceived.context: Rajeev was senior to Abhinav but didn't manage Abhinav directly
recommendationsReceived.description: I have worked with Abhinav on many projects small and large over the past 3+years.  He has a very healthy appetite for taking on challenges that no one else would ever volunteer for.  I have seen him pick up a project from ground and take it to finish line.  Due to NDA policy, I am not able share precise details of his work but I can say he has great skills to write cloud scale code with mindset for flexibility, testability and maintenance of his code. He is a great asset to whatever team he is on and I welcome any/all opportunities to work with him.

recommendationsReceived.name: Shireesh Kantharaj
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: DevOps | Cloud Engineer | AWS x3 | Azure x1 | GC x1 | HC x1 | GitHub x1
recommendationsReceived.description:
Abhinav joined as a fresher in the team as a Software Developer and in no time he mastered the 9 different Applications. His creative thinking, expertise, positive can-do attitude made him an absolute pleasure to work with. 

Abhinav always brought his keen analytical skills to the table and was an excellent leader and ‘doer’ in any team situation, as an example of this, Abhinav initiated an idea of Automating the manual process for which he has been praised & awarded by one of our biggest Clients in Oil & gas Domain and thus I recommend him highly – he will not let you down!

Abhinav is totally a goal oriented person and the best part of him is his learning attitude he can approach any person from whom so ever it might be to get the knowledge,he has handled his areas/tasks very well and knows how to deliver work on time. Abhinav is (and will be) an asset to any large organization looking for a highly effective project/test managers.

Abhinav has been a pleasure to work with and I would have no hesitation in recommending him for any future roles that come up. I can only hope that people I work with in my next project are as dedicated as Abhinav.

All the best Abhinav and keep up the good work.

recommendations.name: Shireesh Kantharaj
recommendations.subtitle: DevOps | Cloud Engineer | AWS x3 | Azure x1 | GC x1 | HC x1 | GitHub x1
recommendations.description:
I have worked under Shireesh in the first project of my IT Career and from the day 1 to the end of my tenure in the Organization, I had never seen him losing his temper on his Team members which is the best example of his healthy relation with the Team. Shireesh played a vibrant role in setting up my goals and exceeding them with the expectations.
He is the “go to person” when conflicts arise. He is very Stringent in terms of the quality of the deliverables and adhering to the timelines, and many best practices can be learnt from him, one among them is to “Network with the people and get their attention towards our capabilities”.
He gives the freedom to innovate along with his support to put it into action. He looks out for his team but is not one to draw attention to himself deliberately – his work does that for him. He has built a reputation as someone who has a broad vision and this vision is what will take a company places.
I highly recommend Mr. Shireesh.
